business_ideas.idea: Companies should adopt Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset instead of cash holdings.
Premium single-word domain names as scarce real estate asset (hope.com, alarm.com, etc).
Free online education platform (Saylor.org) with 500k+ students.

predictions.text: Bitcoin investment income will generate more value for MicroStrategy than operating income in 20 years.
Money supply will expand 15% annually for next 8 years, requiring all companies to own hard assets.
More public companies will adopt Bitcoin treasury strategy within 6-12 months following institutional adoption.
